title: Improve error reporting across congress stack

log.context: Improve error reporting across congress stack

All changes are done. Here's a summary of what was improved:

**`/mnt/data/clunger/src/services/congress.ts`**
- `callGrok`: error message now includes actionable fix path (`add it to /mnt/data/clunger/.env and restart clunger.service`)
- `callGeminiCli`: added pre-flight checks — throws with clear message if binary missing or `GEMINI_API_KEY`/`GOOGLE_API_KEY` not set; captures stderr and includes it in exit-code errors; spawn errors include the binary path; stderr pipe opened (`"pipe"` instead ...(truncated)
